comment.body: the irony is many put trust in morning post and made money.  Being too rigid and not having a plan for what happens IF something ELSE happens is where you get smoked. There is always dynamics at play. This whole up move could've been erased on a single bad headline for example and no one would be blaming the morning post in that instance if they followed it and had been successful going long.

comment.body: like i know people are trying to learn... but sometimes it seems like they are trying to just get the answers without doing the reading or the work.    see, i dont know the math... and i dont spend my time trying to learn it.  but, i have spent a lot  of time using the resources that we were given to develop my own understandings of the powers at play and my style of trading.  like for example, lots of people give wayyy to much focus on charm when its clear for the last couple weeks at least charm is not the dominant greek.. and when people blame alma for losing trades it always confuses me because she didn't tell you to take that trade... and at least for me i always will say that a good trader will blame only themselves and learn what to do different.  keep in mind this is not an easy profession. its zero sum and doesn't care about your excuses.  im not saying this to be mean im saying this because its crucial if you want to be successful at this game. before you even start to learn the reasons why things happened as they did, this is step one.  https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=czOpDN8Knr4
